arts.ttl: Manchester City keeps tabs on wonderkid’s situation – Jorge Mendes handling contract talks
arts.sum: Lamine Yamal is the generational talent whose performances in the European Championships for Spain earned him worldwide recognition. The 17-year-old is likely to be a future Ballon d’Or winner in the future and even though Barcelona are cash-strapped, they won’t sell the winger at any price. arts.sum: Fiorentina defender Pietro Comuzzo could be on his way out after contract renewal talks broke down, with Manchester United among the clubs linked with a move. According to Italian newspaper La Nazione (via TMW), the Red Devils are very keen on the player who Napoli previously tried to sign. arts.ttl: Manchester United squad vs Man City revealed as Ruben Amorim gets shock injury boost

arts.ttl: Five players who could join Man Utd this summer
arts.sum: A number of players are set to be sold by the Red Devils, including Marcus Rashford and Antony, while they are targeting several promising youngsters in a bid to bring long-term success back to Old Trafford. The Red Devils are actively looking to sign a new winger amid the imminent sales of Rashford and Antony, and Dibling is one of their key targets.
